topPros.title: carotenoid content gives it extra value
topPros.explanation: That adds a useful plant-pigment angle beyond the basic carb role most tubers play.

topCons.title: naturally sweeter than some tubers
topCons.explanation: Still fine, but it is not the lowest-sugar energy food in the category.

topCons.title: healthiness depends on preparation
topCons.explanation: Heavy added fats or sugary toppings can change the practical outcome.

topCons.title: protein contribution is light
topCons.explanation: Like most tubers, it is not doing much in the protein lane.

topPros.title: practical staple carb source

topPros.title: can be quite filling

topCons.title: still a carb-heavy category

topCons.title: can go downhill fast when heavily processed
